headline: 3 Stocks With Upgraded Broker Ratings As Markets Hit All-Time High
summary: Broker upgrades focus on BIIB, TEL and ZTO as the S&P 500 and Nasdaq close at record highs on hopes U.S.-Iran peace holds.

headline: Replimune cuts staff; MeiraGTx reacquires eye gene therapy
summary: Replimune is laying off 63 staffers days after the second FDA rejection of its melanoma drug. Elsewhere, Revolution raised $2 billion and a regulatory filing revealed details on negotiations between Biogen and Apellis.
